nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of low-quality or embarrassing output
nodes.grounding_span: I regularly use AI to help me to come up with LinkedIn content to promote my business

nodes.label: AI output quality and authenticity
nodes.label_negative: AI output that is obviously AI-written or wrong
nodes.grounding_span: there is a lot of really bad AI only output on LinkedIn and I don't want one of those posts associated with me

nodes.label: Human creative control and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I always have a creative direction in mind before starting

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with it to complete the task

nodes.label: AI tool specialization and switching
nodes.grounding_span: I frequently will use a different tool for visual elements than for text because I find that some tools work better for different things

nodes.label: AI image generation reliability
nodes.grounding_span: It's frustrating when you mostly like an image, but you want a relatively minor change and when you prompt the AI to change that 1 thing, they dramatically change the image instead of tweaking it

nodes.label: AI impact on labor market
nodes.grounding_span: AI has decimated the labor market in that industry, especially in more expensive countries

nodes.label: Professional reputation and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want one of those posts associated with me

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: it can really speed up output while still doing quality work if used correctly

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and independent thinking
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to think for yourself and only use AI as an efficiency tool

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: There are also activities that I do because I enjoy them

nodes.label: Careful editing and quality control stance
nodes.grounding_span: I always edit AI output prior to posting

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation
nodes.grounding_span: It's frustrating when you mostly like an image, but you want a relatively minor change and when you prompt the AI to change that 1 thing, they dramatically change the image

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I don't expect to change how I work with AI much. I think that it's important to think for yourself and only use AI as an efficiency tool

nodes.label: Negative view of AI's labor market impact
nodes.grounding_span: AI has decimated the labor market in that industry

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and multi-tool comparison
nodes.grounding_span: I might use the same prompt with a second chatbot if I didn't like the output of the first

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit analysis of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: if I would need to do just as much work reviewing as I would doing the activity myself, I will just do it myself
